highlights.text: This got us long and I wrote at 4:20PM Monday “I have added long exposure a little after the close ~6396 as we put in a nice Failed Breakdown of the 6396 low set at 2:40PM.” I also wrote: “My general lean though is always to defer to the trend.
I was looking for more after this, and I wrote on Tuesday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
As I wrote yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
Fortunately, my edge (Failed Breakdowns) is built around following institutions when they buy this dips, by exploiting a known footprint they leave on the chart when they do.
The question for today was if bulls could maintain those all time highs and survive any dips to put in a Failed Breakdown.
This setup a Failed Breakdown of the Tuesday 6461 major low.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdown we had at Monday’s close which triggered the 100+ point leg up we saw this week, and I’ll discuss the actionable trade plan for tomorrow.
6467-69 to 6494=a new, preliminary range with 84 magnet inside.

post_title: SPX Is Coiled Tight Again. A Move Is Coming. What Way? August 15 Plan
